reviews.review_description: For the people who said it’s trash or impossible don’t listen to them they just got skill issues because I beat this on day 2 of me playing and there’s 3 things they need to add 1 is cosmetics like hats and gloves and we need restart or more levels and level creator
Not very good I wish that it was easier

ever since this game first came out, ive been playing this forever. I beat it on my third day and was excited. But i finally downloaded it again and now its empty. I want to restart the game and have fun, but how?

This is an amazing VR game for someone who wants a quick break to get up and move their body.

Swing through brightly-colored levels gradually working up to insane laser-filled jungle gyms of doom.  Would recommend this for adults or kids.

I loved it and played to 100% completion.

reviews.review_title: I got this at full price but still happy
reviews.review_description:
3 days later it friggin goes on sale for 73% off...

Am I mad? A little... I couldn't refund it because I played it too long. This friggin game is so addictive I had played it for too long in one session I was shocked!

If you like climbing and throwing yourself in the air while climbing this is great. Quick short levels so when you die you quickly try again. I give it a pass for being a monkey game because well... its monkey bars... 🐒

Great level design, responsive controls, it's like the arcade version of climbing
You should get it it's very good
I plead you

Honestly, I truly feel that this game is legendary with all it’s unique and fun levels with huge ton of content, I honestly can’t bare the aura this game has. the only problem is… barely anybody is online now, it was so popular back then, I don’t know why so many people left, we need to bring that back. Also, developers, can you add more levels, it would be absolutely amazing if you could, everybody that’s part of your community would probably be so happy! Love you guys!❤️

Tried to get a refund. My son kept trying to play,

 but it kept crashing.

reviews.review_title: Fun but don't play if you rage easily
reviews.review_description: The game is super fun.But if you rage easily you won't like it.
I love this game it’s my favorite game and it’s worth 20 dollars so get it or do the free trial
It’s fun it’s just ges boring after a while also some levels require so much skill while others require no skill it’s unbalanced in my opinion

developer_response.body:
Hi JoMoo64,
I am sorry to hear that you found some parts too difficult. If you would be interested, our Discord community is super helpful and could share tips and tricks with you. Go to www.toss.game and navigate to the button that takes you to Discord.

Also, check out this video from one our members that show some great tips: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9zLSfSOH8dI

Hope that helps!

All the best,
Albin | Agera Games

reviews.review_title: Buy if you are looking for a rage game
reviews.review_description: This game sucks in my opinion. It's very frustrating and the movement is to clingy and bouncy. The main point of this review is to talk about the recent B sides update though. The B sides suck it doesn't tell you how to unlock each world. So if you're like me you'll end up spending 30 minutes 100%ing only to be left in confusion when you can't unlock the next world. What you REALLY have to do is find random banana guys placed somewhere in 3 worlds. Don't buy you will waste money
I tried this game today because my son was playing and wow, it's really fun. Great concept too.

This game is definitely worth it- in my opinion, it needs more attention.
Basically, you’re a monkey, grabbing and dodging things in the sky.
You can collect different wristbands and bananas, and the quality of the game is really good!
There’s so many levels, with HOURS of playtime- and the levels get progressively harder, but add more obstacles!
It’s one of my favorite games right now, I totally recommend it. Worth the price.
100000% recommended the graphics and movement is amazing but annoyed that there’s no multiplayer
My friend and I thought it was a multiplayer game but it was not and I was disappointed with the levels but besides that it's actually a good game

developer_response.body:
Hi there! We are currently adding multiplayer to the game, and if you'd like to play with your friend TODAY you can actually join the open beta! You can read this blog post for more info, or join our Discord and we're happy to tell you all about how you and your friend can play together :)

https://www.oculus.com/experiences/quest/developer-post/731889678771388/
https://discord.com/invite/MwnsNGz

reviews.review_description: the story mode it's fun it get Harder and harder
So when ever I go to multiplayer the same level that I was on normally on IS IN THE SAME LEVEL I PICKED IN MULTIPLAYER WHICH IS NOT MY NORMAL LEVEL
